prompt: 2D WebGL neon shrine-defense: tap to rotate monk shots, hold to charge lotus beam, swipe to dash; yokai rush, spirit bombs explode zones, and healing lanterns restore you in alleys.
Rainy neon-Edo 2D WebGL lane brawler: ronin, turret drones, oni bikers, shrine gates; tap gates to switch lanes, hold for katana dash, swipe to deflect shots into bikers.
Neon alley 2D WebGL arena: tap Palette Totems to change background hue, drag Prism Shields to parry swarming Ink Wraiths, hold Chroma Seeds to charge stunning bursts; touch-only on phone.
